episodes.title: Oneida: The Cult Behind A Silverware Company | Odd Stories Ep. 1
episodes.description:
On this debut episode of Odd Stories, Oliver and Doug discuss the strange eugenics-loving cult behind a well-known silverware company. If you watch the video, feel free to comment and give some criticisms and all that
